title: preparedview.remove
description: Create a reviewable filesystem plan that removes a generated project source view. Only paths recorded as part of the view are included; inventory data is never targeted. Destructive destination is always 'archive' (R-026-Dest-Archive). The response planId enters the standard spec 017/025 pipeline (approve → apply). All spec 017/025 error codes can surface during apply. Allowed only when the owning project lifecycle is setup_incomplete|ready|prepared|processing|blocked|completed; refused on archived with lifecycle.read_only (R-026-Lifecycle). Status: NOT IMPLEMENTED.

viewId.description: Identifier of the PreparedSourceView to remove.

planId.description: Identifier of the produced ViewRemovalPlan (a FilesystemPlan with origin prepared_view_removal). The plan enters the standard spec 017/025 pipeline: approve then apply. Destructive destination is hard-coded to archive.

allowedLifecycleStates.description: Lifecycle states in which this operation is permitted.
